title: charness usage-episodes adapter
description: Repo-local manifest declaring how a user-facing product records privacy-bounded usage episodes for H-LAM/T analysis. Loaded from .agents/usage-episodes-adapter.yaml. Absence means no capture/validation target; enabled:false keeps the file but suppresses validation of runtime JSONL.

enabled.description: Whether usage episode validation/capture is active for this repo.

storage_path.description: Path relative to repo root containing usage_episode.jsonl.

events.description: Subset of v1 events captured by this repo. Omit to capture all v1 events.

raw_prompt.description: Must be false for the shared episode substrate.

raw_transcript.description: Must be false for the shared episode substrate.

user_identity.description: Where user identity, if any, is governed. The shared schema does not carry identity.

policy_ref.description: Optional product-owned privacy or retention policy reference when raw source material is retained outside this schema.

privacy.description: Privacy posture for shared usage episodes.

rotation.description: Optional local retention policy for runtime JSONL files.

claude.description: Whether charness installs a SessionStart hook entry into the resolved Claude settings.json. Default disabled; opt in explicitly before charness init/update touches host settings.

codex.description: Whether charness installs a SessionStart hook entry into ~/.codex/config.toml (or hooks.json when that file already carries hook entries on the same layer). Default disabled.

host_hooks.description: Per-host install intent for the SessionStart capture hook. Reconciled by charness init/update; surfaced by `charness session-capture status`.

claude.description: Whether charness installs the find-skills SessionStart routing hook into the resolved Claude settings.json. Default disabled.

codex.description: Whether charness installs the find-skills SessionStart routing hook into ~/.codex/config.toml (or hooks.json when that file already carries hook entries on the same layer). Default disabled.

find_skills_routing.description: Per-host install intent for the find-skills SessionStart routing hook. Reconciled by charness init/update and surfaced by `charness session-capture status`.
